## Source Record

## Why It Matters

This is the top-level framing for the docs stack in this repo. It explains that Fumadocs is a React-first docs framework, highlights the CLI bootstrap flow, and names the core package split used downstream: `fumadocs-mdx`, `fumadocs-core`, and `fumadocs-ui`.

## Key Excerpts

> "Fumadocs is a React.js documentation framework for Developers... works seamlessly with any React.js framework, CMS -- anything."

> "pnpm create fumadocs-app"

> "Separated as Content -> Core -> UI, offering the high composability that engineers love."

> "Official support for Next.js, Tanstack Start, React Router, Waku -- portable to any React.js framework."

## Capture Notes

- The landing page is marketing-heavy; only stack-defining claims were retained.
- The page explicitly surfaces the package layering that matters for this repo's docs implementation.
- The page also confirms first-party CLI setup and MDX-first authoring as the expected workflow.
